name: lodestone
description: Evidence-based market research: find real problems with real demand before you build.

scripts.dev:web: if [ -d web ]; then npm --prefix web run dev; else echo 'web/ not present in this checkout'; fi
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && if [ -d web ]; then npm --prefix web run build; else echo 'web/ not present — nothing to build'; fi
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && if [ -d web ]; then npm --prefix web run typecheck; fi
